title: A short proof of the cap-set lower bound via polynomial multiplicities
abstract: We give a one-page proof of Edel's lower bound for cap sets in $\mathbb{F}_3^n$ using a multiplicity argument adapted from the Croot–Lev–Pach method.
ai_proof_review:
## Setup

A self-contained note giving a streamlined proof of a known lower bound. The novelty is presentational.

## Main argument

The multiplicity bookkeeping is elementary and explicit. I worked through it and recovered the same constant. No subtleties.

## Overall

Nice exposition; nothing more, nothing less. A clean teaching note that may be cited by the additive combinatorics community.
